revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Browse template documentation]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Browse template documentation]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Browse_template_documentation here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Browse_template_documentation for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Road data/browse}}
This template is used to show browse links for the {{para|browse}} parameter of {{tl|Infobox road}}.
== Parameters == * '''previous_type''': The type of route the proceeds the current one in the system. See [[:en:Template:Infobox road/doc/type|this page]] for a list. * '''previous_route''': The number of the route preceding this one. * '''previous_dab''': Any disambiguation needed to generate the correct link to the previous route. * '''route''': The route associated with the current browse row. Typically used only if the browsing route is not the route that the rest of the infobox is about. * '''next_type''': Same as "previous_type" but for the route following this one. * '''next_route''': The number of the route succeeding this one. * '''next_dab''': Same as "previous_dab" but for the route following this one.
== See also == * {{cl|Browse templates}}
<includeonly></includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Browse templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
